title: Rage (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Rage''''' could refer to these things:
*[[Rage (corsair battleship)|''Rage'']], a Sith corsair battleship
*[[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']], an Imperial Star Destroyer
*[[Rage rancor]]
*[[Force rage|Force Enrage]], a Force power that allowed the user to use the dark side to fight with more vigor and might
*[[Focused rage]], a Force technique that made the user able to strike harder and endure harm by delving into fury
{{Disambig}}
